title: GSSSB Junior Pharmacist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 14 Posts
short_info: The Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB) has officially announced the Junior Pharmacist, Class-3 Recruitment 2026 with 14 openings. The detailed notification was published under Advertisement No. 408/2026-27 at GSSSB Official Website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 18 to 35 years and hold qualifications such as Bachelor’s degree in Pharmacy, Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.), or Diploma in Pharmacy with 2 years experience along with basic computer knowledge and adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both can now submit their online applications from 15-05-2026 to 29-05-

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: 10 years for PwD (General) males (max 43 years); 15 years for PwD (General) females (max 45 years); 15 years for PwD (Reserved) males (max 45 years); 20 years for PwD (Reserved) females (max 45 years)

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s degree in Pharmacy or Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.), Diploma in Pharmacy with 2 years experience, Basic knowledge of computer application, Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or Both
qualification.details: Bachelor’s degree in Pharmacy or Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) obtained from any University established or incorporated by or under the Central or a State Act in India or any other educational institution recognised as such or declared as deemed to be University under Section 3 of the University Grants Commission Act, 1956; or a Diploma in Pharmacy obtained from any of the Universities established or incorporated by or under the Central or a State Act in India or any other educational institution recognised as such or declared as deemed to be a University under Section 3 of the University Grants Commission Act, 1956; and having about two years experience as a Junior Pharmacist in Government, Government Undertaking or Board or as a Dispenser in the hospital or in dispensaries or as a Pharmacist or Medical Representative of any of the Pharmaceutical Company established under the Companies Act, 2013; possess the basic knowledge of computer application as prescribed in Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules, 1967; and possess adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or Both

selection_process: MCQ CBRT/OMR Computer Based Response Test Part-A (90 marks): Reasoning
English and Gujarati Comprehension Part-B (120 marks): Subject related questions Document Verification Merit List
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GSSSB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GSSSB Junior Pharmacist, Class-3 recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form is 29th May 2026. Ensure all details are submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 35 years as of the specified date.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Pharmacist post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor’s degree in Pharmacy or Pharm.D., or a Diploma in Pharmacy with two years of experience, along with computer and language proficiency.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Pharmacist, Class-3 position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 14 vacancies announced for the Junior Pharmacist, Class-3 posts by GSSSB.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 400/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Junior Pharmacist post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Junior Pharmacist post ranges from Rs. 40800 to Rs. 92300 per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for GSSSB Junior Pharmacist recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an MCQ CBRT/OMR Computer Based Response Test, Document Verification, and Merit List preparation.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Gujarat apply for this post?
faq.answer: The notification is for Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board, implying it is for positions within Gujarat. Candidates should check the official notification for specific domicile requirements.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for Persons with Disabilities (PwD) as detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are available in the "Important Links" section of this article.
